---
title: "Contact & References"
author: "Alexander Meehan"
---

## Get In Touch

I'm currently available for opportunities from **May 2026**. 
Whether you have a question, an opportunity, or just want to connect, 
feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

::: {.callout-note}
The best way to reach me is via email or LinkedIn.
:::

## Contact Details

| Method | Details |
|---|---|
| **Email** | [alex.meehan2001@gmail.com](mailto:alex.meehan2001@gmail.com) |
| **LinkedIn** | [alexander-meehan-267875208](https://linkedin.com/in/alexander-meehan-267875208) |
| **GitHub** | [alexandermeehan](https://github.com/alexandermeehan) |
| **Location** | Dublin, Ireland |

## References

References are available upon request. Please reach out via email 
and I will be happy to provide details.
